question: In the Gospel of John, what reason do Jesus’ opponents give for wanting to stone him after he speaks about his unity with the Father?

choices.A: Because you, being a man, make yourself God
choices.B: Because you refused to pay taxes
choices.C: Because you broke the Sabbath by traveling

teaching.title: Stated accusation in the narrative
teaching.body: John’s Gospel reports the opponents explicitly saying they want to stone Jesus “because you, being a man, make yourself God.”
